narrative:
Beavercreek 019 (precinct in Greene County) has 866 registered voters, with 46.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.8 percentage points.
